name: refund-eligibility-checker-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Evaluate return/refund eligibility based on policy constraints (days elapsed, product category, and item condition).
author: genpark

purchase_date.description: Date of order in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format.

claim_date.description: Date claim submitted in ISO YYYY-MM-DD format.

product_category.description: Optional category (e.g. cosmetics/perishables may be exempt).
